The combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR provides a reliable and robust trading strategy in the BTCUSD 1h chart as it is able to capture trend reversals while also managing risk effectively. The use of ADX adds an extra layer of confirmation for a strong trend, while ATR based stop loss and take profit helps in managing risk effectively.
Combining advanced indicators such as RSI, Bollinger bands, ATR, and EMA can lead to a robust trading strategy that effectively identifies trends and market conditions.
